tools.name: authenticate_client
tools.description: Authenticate a client session using client ID and OTP before using client-specific tools.

otp.description: One-time passcode. Local demo OTP is 9632.

tools.name: get_client_onboarding_status
tools.description: Get the onboarding status for the authenticated client.

tools.name: get_client_basic_info
tools.description: Get the authenticated client's basic name or family value.

tools.name: get_client_facility_limit
tools.description: Get the current facility limit in EUR and client name for the authenticated client.

tools.name: summarize_client_outreach
tools.description: Summarize outreach highlights for the authenticated client, including outreach reasons and how many questions should be answered.
